events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: condenser/heat pump setting, clearance to wall/other units below mfr minimum. This is non-compliant with manufacturer instructions and likely code (IMC/IRC M1401 requires equipment installed per manufacturer instructions). Decision: fail. Risk: medium (reduced clearance can cause overheating, reduced airflow, serviceability issues). Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective. Percent complete: rough-complete, maybe 70%. Confidence high.
